1713	type Run struct {
1714		// Stable identifier for this run record
1715		ID string `json:"id"`
1716		// Which layer this record belongs to
1717		Layer RunLayer `json:"layer"`
1718		// Current status (pending, running, success, failure, preserved)
1719		Status string `json:"status"`
1720		// Project ID this run belongs to (set for all runs; enables combined cross-project views)
1721		ProjectID *string `json:"projectID,omitempty"`
1722		// When the run started
1723		StartedAt *string `json:"startedAt,omitempty"`
1724		// When the run completed (null if still running)
1725		CompletedAt *string `json:"completedAt,omitempty"`
1726		// Bead ID associated with this run (null for work-layer records with multiple beads)
1727		BeadID *string `json:"beadId,omitempty"`
1728		// Artifact ID produced by this run (null if none)
1729		ArtifactID *string `json:"artifactId,omitempty"`
1730		// Parent run ID (null for top-level work records)
1731		ParentRunID *string `json:"parentRunId,omitempty"`
1732		// IDs of child runs (try records for work, run records for try)
1733		ChildRunIds []string `json:"childRunIds"`
1734		// Raw queue inputs as JSON (work layer only)
1735		QueueInputs *string `json:"queueInputs,omitempty"`
1736		// Stop condition for the queue drain (work layer only)
1737		StopCondition *string `json:"stopCondition,omitempty"`
1738		// Bead IDs selected for this queue drain (work layer only)
1739		SelectedBeadIds []string `json:"selectedBeadIds,omitempty"`
1740		// Git revision the try attempt started from (try layer only)
1741		BaseRevision *string `json:"baseRevision,omitempty"`
1742		// Git revision produced by the try attempt (try layer only)
1743		ResultRevision *string `json:"resultRevision,omitempty"`
1744		// Isolated worktree path used during the attempt (try layer only)
1745		WorktreePath *string `json:"worktreePath,omitempty"`
1746		// Merge or preserve outcome (try layer only)
1747		MergeOutcome *string `json:"mergeOutcome,omitempty"`
1748		// Check results as JSON (try layer only)
1749		CheckResults *string `json:"checkResults,omitempty"`
1750		// Short summary of the prompt (run layer only)
1751		PromptSummary *string `json:"promptSummary,omitempty"`
1752		// Minimum power/effort level requested (run layer only)
1753		PowerMin *int `json:"powerMin,omitempty"`
1754		// Maximum power/effort level requested (run layer only)
1755		PowerMax *int `json:"powerMax,omitempty"`
1756		// Agent harness used (run layer only)

1758		// Provider name (run layer only)

1760		// Model identifier (run layer only)
1761		Model *string `json:"model,omitempty"`
1762		// Input token count (run layer only)

1764		// Output token count (run layer only)
1765		TokensOut *int `json:"tokensOut,omitempty"`
1766		// Estimated cost in USD (run layer only)

1768		// Duration in milliseconds (run layer only)

input.command:
git commit -m "fix(server): lossless join when stored Run shares id with AgentSession [ddx-65543530]

loadRunsForProject previously dropped the synthesized session-derived
record whenever a stored Run already used the same id, losing
AgentSession-projected fields (harness, model, tokens, cost, etc.).
Replace the dedupe-and-skip path with a field-level merge: stored
values win, synthesized values fill the gaps.

Add a state_runs_test that fixes a sparse stored run-layer record
alongside a matching AgentSession entry and asserts the resolver
returns one Run carrying fields from both sources." 2>&1 | tail -15

[detached HEAD ad29ae6] fix(server): lossless join when stored Run shares id with AgentSession [ddx-65543530]
 2 files changed, 188 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)

data.text: Committed as ad29ae6. The lossless join is now implemented at the data-source level: when a stored Run shares an ID with an AgentSession-derived projection, fields from both sources are merged into a single Run rather than the session-derived record being dropped. New test `TestRunsLossless_StoredJoinsWithSession` verifies the merge.
